raw_consumer_statement: After several years of service XXXX XXXX water delivery stopped service to my residence. The last delivery was on XX/XX/year>, when XXXX XXXX gallon bottles were left. XXXX charged our XXXX ( Citi ) visa {$85.00}, which included a deposit of {$36.00} for the XXXX bottles of water delivered. On XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX, a messages were sent to XXXX to pick up the empty bottles and refund the {$36.00} deposit. XXXX failed to do so. On XX/XX/XXXX, a letter was sent to XXXX reiterating the request. XXXX did not respond. On XX/XX/year>, a dispute was entered with Citi on its website and a conditional credit of {$36.00} was given by Citi. All details and a copy of the letter to XXXX were provided to Citi. Citi assigned case # Id XXXX. However, on XX/XX/year>, Citi sent notice " The review of your dispute has been completed, '' stating it had determined I am responsible for the disputed amount - erroneously stated as {$85.00}. No factual basis for the denial was given. Therefore, on XX/XX/year>, I sent a letter to Citi pointing out its errors and requested reconsideration. The request has been ignored.
